title: RETROSPEC Epoch
description: Schema for historical eras in RETROSPEC. Epochs are the 'chapters' of AI history, each representing a distinct period with its own themes, breakthroughs, and characteristics.

date_end.description: End date of the epoch, or null if ongoing

summary.description: Rich summary of the epoch — what defined it, what changed, why it matters

key_events.description: IDs of the most significant events in this epoch

key_figures.description: IDs of the most influential people in this epoch

key_models.description: IDs of notable models from this epoch

key_concepts.description: Core concepts that emerged or matured in this epoch

defining_characteristics.description: What made this epoch distinct from those before and after it

preceded_by.description: ID of the previous epoch, or null for the first

succeeded_by.description: ID of the next epoch, or null for the current/last

significance.description: How transformative this epoch was for the overall trajectory of AI
